_setup_instructions.output_root: Root directory for generated source files, relative to the project. Most React/TS projects use 'src'. The skill writes everything under this path.
_setup_instructions.components_dir: Subdirectory under output_root where one .tsx + .module.css pair is written per artboard. Example: 'components' or 'features/landing'.
_setup_instructions.icons_dir: Subdirectory under output_root for SVG-as-React components produced by SVGR. Example: 'components/icons'.
_setup_instructions.assets_dir: Subdirectory under output_root for raster assets (PNG/JPG) exported from Sketch slices. Example: 'assets' or 'public/img'.
_setup_instructions.tokens_path: Path under output_root for the generated CSS-Modules tokens file. The file contains :root custom properties and is imported once at the app root. Example: 'styles/tokens.module.css'.
_setup_instructions.sketchtool_path: Absolute path to the sketchtool binary. Default works on macOS with a standard Sketch.app install. On Apple Silicon this path is the same. Sketchtool ships inside Sketch.app and has no separate installer.
